textByHash.ed6802f0d556b5eb7dda0df74830930c3383a2b3: Good day sir. Could I interest you in one of our finest Bloody Bracers? It's a local speciality.
textByHash.332845b78b3aac39e5ad8759af86ccd01ed2a9b5: Then for now, our business is at an end.
textByHash.d069a86cdc3d27e917e9745eee4acabda1fab372: He had to leave I'm afraid. Fear not though. I have taken over things here.
textByHash.778a55be9d041cdf70a84c1a761eb591beef14c5: Roy is the name. Now, could I interest you in one of our finest Bloody Bracers?
